sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT 
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Infrastructure Change ID` AS Changes,
  Date(`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Submit Date`) AS Submit_Date,
  `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Change Request Status` AS Status,
    CASE
      WHEN `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Company` IS NOT NULL THEN `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Company`
      ELSE 'SAAS'
   END Company,
   `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Priority` AS Priority,
   `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Support Group Name` AS Support_Group_Name
   
FROM `AR System Schema`.`CHG:Infrastructure Change`
where(
`CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Submit Date`  >=$__from/1000 and `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000
AND
 `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Company` IN ($Company)
 AND
 `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`ASGRP` IN ($CoordinatorGroup)
 AND
 `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Priority` IN ($Priority)
 AND
 `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Change Request Status` IN ($Status))
 AND
 `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Change Request Status` NOT IN ('Completed', 'Closed','Cancelled','Draft')

list.definition: remedy,{"sql": "SELECT DISTINCT (CASE WHEN `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Company` IS NOT NULL THEN `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Company` ELSE 'SAAS' END) Company FROM `CHG:Infrastructure Change` WHERE  `CHG:Infrastructure Change`.`Change Request Status` NOT IN ('Completed', 'Closed','Cancelled','Draft') LIMIT 1000"}
list.name: Company
